ciel_bizarre.title: A Bizarre Sky
ciel_bizarre.text:
You're out of your house this morning.

The sky is full of colorful clouds.

A pink and round that dances gently.
A dark blue that rumbles on its own.
A yellow that jumps like a child.

Aikito is sitting next to you.
It lifts the snout towards the sky.

**"In this village, emotions rise into the sky. *
**"They become clouds. *

You look above your head.

A tiny orange cloud floats there.

**"It's yours.** says Aikito.
**« Curiosity has an orange colour. *

marchand_arrive.title: Mr. Grey
marchand_arrive.text:
In the square, a carriage stops.

INDUSTRIAL DIY**
*Emotions well arranged. All the same. *

A man in a grey suit comes down.

Hello! Your clouds are far too... different. *
**"I bring well tidy clouds instead! *

He pulls a big net.

And start catching the clouds of the village.

The rose resists.
The blue rumbles louder.
Yellow jumps faster and faster.

**"Stop! You shout.

aikito_conseil.title: Aikito Council
aikito_conseil.text:
Aikito is looking at you.

**"Dogs show their emotions directly. *
**"We don't need clouds. *

He's looking at Mr. Grey.

**"But he's afraid of something. *
**"Look at his cloud. *

Over Mr. Grey floats a tiny cloud.
Grey.
Alone.
All sad.

**"Go talk to him.** says Aikito.

pourquoi_gris.title: Why?
pourquoi_gris.text:
You're standing in front of Mr. Grey.

**"Why are you taking our clouds? *

He stops.

**"Because they're too different. *
**"It's messy. *
**"People see your emotions and it bothers them. *

You look at his little gray cloud above him.

**"What about yours? You're asking.

He's looking up.

Her smile stops for a second.

choices.text: " Your cloud is all grey and all alone. »

secret_gris.title: The Secret
secret_gris.text:
Mr. Grey looks at his cloud for a long time.

**"It was coloured before. *

His voice changes.
Softer.

**"But people said my emotions were too strong. *
**"Too visible. *
**"Then I put everything in grey. *

He keeps his net down slowly.

**"And I thought it would be better for everyone. *

Aikito is approaching.
He lays his foot on Mr. Gris' foot.

**"It wasn't a good idea.** says Aikito.
**"But it's not too late. *

choices.text: Smile at him without saying anything.

fin_couleurs.title: End — True Heaven
fin_couleurs.text:
Mr. Grey closes his eyes.

His little gray cloud is beginning to change.

First purple.
Then red.
Then bright yellow.

He's opening his eyes.

**"I... I didn't know. *
**"It's been a long time. *

The sky above the village is full of colorful clouds.

All different.
All true.

Aikito raises the snout.

**"This is the most beautiful sky I've ever seen. *

And for once,
Everyone agrees.

fin_gris_part.title: End — The Cloud Who Waits
fin_gris_part.text:
Mr. Gris leaves with his empty carriage.

He stops at the edge of the village.

He looks at the sky one last time.

His little gray cloud floats above him.

But you notice something.

Very small.
In a corner.

Red dot.

It's like a blaze waiting.

Aikito is looking at you.

**"He may come back. *
**"When it is ready. *

exploration_nuages.title: The Clouds of the Village
exploration_nuages.text:
You walk around the village with Aikito.

Above each house, different clouds.

The baker has a warm brown cloud.
*Pride for his morning bread. *

The factor has a clear green cloud.
* Fun walking every day. *

A little girl has a purple cloud swirling.
She dreams of something beautiful. *

You look at yours.
Orange. Curious. A little impatient.

**"Each cloud tells a story.** says Aikito.
**"That's why they're all different. *

choices.text: Ask the little girl what she thinks.

petite_fille_nuage.title: Lea's Dream
petite_fille_nuage.text:
The little girl is looking at you.

**"I dream of flying.** she simply says.
**"Every evening. *

She shows her purple cloud.

**"It appears when I think about it. *

She's smiling.

**"I love my cloud. *
**"He looks like nobody else. *

Aikito moves the tail.

**" Exactly. *

That's where you hear the car coming to the square.

village_peur.title: The Fear of the Village
village_peur.text:
Mr. Grey is listening to you.

But the inhabitants of the village are putting their heads down.

The baker hides her brown cloud behind her apron.
The mailman looks at his feet.

**"Maybe he's right..."** whispers someone.
**"Our clouds are a little... too visible. *

You're watching Aikito.

He grunts slowly.

**"They are ashamed of their emotions. *
**"This is the real problem. *

montrer_nuage.title: My Cloud
montrer_nuage.text:
You raise your arms.

Your orange cloud rises a little higher.

**"Mys is curiosity. *
**"It's not perfect. *
**"But it's me. *

The baker's looking at you.

She hesitates.

Then she takes off her apron.

His warm brown cloud reappears.

**"Mys is pride.** she says softly.

One by one, the others do the same.

Mr. Grey looks around him.
Then her little gray cloud.
Then you.
